title: Keel Toys 30cm Keeleco Giraffe
features: Made from the Highest Quality Materials
description: From the manufacturer Keeleco Keeleco is the NEW 100% recycled range from Keel Toys. These toys are manufactured and stuffed with 100% recycled polyester from plastic waste. Weighted with recycled glass beads, these floppy toys have been perfectly designed for hugging by a loving new friend. Traditional glass eyes have been replaced with recycled polyester embroidered eyes which give a unique, and playful character to these Eco soft toys. The iconic Keel symbol and hang tag are now formed from card and attached to the toy with recycled polyester thread. Even the sew in label is recycled, and all are manufactured in an ICTI ethical factory. Designed in the UK by Keel Toys we Love to Hug! Features: 100% Recycled 100% Huggable ECO soft toys including wild, jungle, woodland, sea life and farm animals. Recycled: These toys are manufactured and stuffed with rPET polyester made from 100% recycled plastic waste. Approximately 10 water bottles makes a 18cm toy, 14 bottles 25cm toy and 16 bottles a 30cm toy. Sustainable: The Keeleco process gives plastic a second life and uses up to 59 percent less energy to produce than virgin polyester. Design & Safety: UK Design, Toy recognised by the iconic Keel Toys card disc. British safety standard BS EN 71 & European safety standard EN71 hand washable.

specifications_table.Material Care Instructions: ‎Hand Wash Only, Wipe with clean damp cloth
